overview: Timor-Leste and NTT share a pre-colonial history on the island of Timor with deep cultural and family ties.
colonial_period: Portugal controlled the east and the Netherlands controlled the west; later Indonesia annexed West Timor.
independence: Timor-Leste regained independence in 2002 after a UN-administered transition.
modern_relations: Today Timor-Leste and NTT maintain strong links in family, trade, education, and transport.
